scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/api && npm run test --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
